air-fryer-grilled-cheese.name: Air Fryer Grilled Cheese
instructions: Preheat air fryer to 193°C (175 degrees C).
Spread 1/2 teaspoon butter on each slice of bread. Place 1 slice of bread, butter side down in the air fryer. Top with 2 slices cheese. Place 2nd slice of bread, butter side up, over cheese.
Air-fry until golden brown, 3 to 4 minutes. Flip sandwich over and air-fry an additional 1 to 2 minutes.

air-fryer-venison-burgers.name: Air Fryer Venison Burgers
instructions: Preheat an air fryer to 204°C (200 degrees C) according to the manufacturer's instructions.
Combine venison, Worcestershire sauce, seasoned salt, onion powder, and pepper in a large bowl. Mix with your hands until evenly combined, then form into four patties.

Place two patties into the air fryer basket and cook for 6 minutes. Carefully flip the patties and cook for 2 more minutes. Transfer to a paper towel-lined plate and repeat with the remaining patties.
Serve on hamburger buns.

aleppo-pepperroasted-pork-with-shallot-v.name: Aleppo Pepper–roasted Pork With Shallot Vinaigrette

ingredients.item: Aleppo pepper or 2 tbsp. crushed red pepper flakes
Aleppo pepper or 2 tsp. crushed red pepper flakes
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Mix garlic, Aleppo, salt, and sugar in a small bowl; rub over pork. Place in a large roasting pan. Cover and chill 12–24 hours.

Preheat oven to 300°. Uncover pork and roast, basting with drippings every hour or so and covering with foil if browning too quickly, until an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of pork registers 145° (meat will be very tender but not quite falling off the bone), 6–7 hours. Transfer to a cutting board and let rest at least 30 minutes before slicing.
DO AHEAD: Pork can be roasted 1 day ahead. Let cool; cover and chill. Reheat in a 225° oven (about 1 hour).
Whisk shallots, vinegar, parsley, marjoram, Aleppo pepper, oil, sugar, and 2 Tbsp. water in a medium bowl. Season with salt and black pepper; serve with pork.
DO AHEAD: Vinaigrette can be made 6 hours ahead. Cover and chill.

alphabet-soup-recipe-comedera.name: Alphabet Soup Recipe
instructions: The onion and garlic teeth are good. He cuts his tomato stem and cuts in half. Add all cut vegetables to the blender.
Fold the two cups of water and polish very well until you have a homogenous text.
Warm up a pot or pan with two tablets of olive oil. When at temperature, purify letter soon for 5 minutes or till golden.
Fold the mix before the pot with salt to taste and chicken stock cube. Meg and cook with high heat till it's broken.
Drop the fire and finish cooking for about 8 to 10 minutes or till the letter soup's soft.
Once ready, put out and let some rest.
Serve and company with lemon juice and fresh cheese. Enjoy!

anchovy-casserole-lezzet.name: Anchovy Casserole
instructions: 1. Clean onions and garlic and shore.
2. Clean the peppers and chop the ring.
3. Peel the peel of the potatoes and repel the irice.
4. Peel the shells of tomatoes and chop them in the form of cube.
5. Thickly chop the leaves.
6. Take a large rough and mix of vegetables and raw materials.

and-baked-fish-fillet.name: And Baked Fish Fillet
instructions: Place flounder in a baking dish; season with salt and pepper.
Mix together lemon juice, melted butter, and onion in a small bowl; pour over flounder.
Bake in the preheated oven until fish is opaque and flakes easily with a fork, 25 to 30 minutes.

angel-pap-with-pomegranate-teleculinaria.name: Angel Pap With Pomegranate
instructions: Uncategorize tins with margarine and start the oven at 180 degrees. In a bowl, beat the yolks very well with the mixer for 20 minutes until they become quite bulky. Divide it by the tins and put it in the oven until it's cooked. Remove from the oven, deform and reserve.
Put the sugar in a pot, add the orange liqueur, the water and the orange peel, take it to the fire and boil until you get the yarn point. Take it out of the fire and let it cool.
Pass the angel talk through the syrup and throw them in a deep bowl. Water with the rest of the syrup and lead to cold. Then serve decorated with pomegranate berries.

apple-blackberry-pie.name: Apple Blackberry Pie
instructions: Preheat the oven to 218°C (220 degrees C).

Melt butter in a small saucepan over medium-low heat; stir in flour to make a smooth paste. Whisk white sugar, brown sugar, water, and lemon juice into butter mixture. Bring to a simmer, whisking constantly, until sauce thickens, about 3 minutes. Stir 6 blackberry halves into sauce, reduce heat to low; continue cooking while you complete remaining steps, stirring sauce occasionally.

Line a 9-inch pie dish with 1 pastry crust. Arrange apple slices and remaining blackberries in crust. Cut remaining pastry crust into 1-inch wide strips; weave into a lattice top over filling. Pinch strip ends to crust edges to seal. Spoon blackberry sauce over pie; let it soak through crust. Transfer pie to a baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven for 15 minutes. Reduce oven temperature to 177°C (175 degrees C); continue baking until crust is golden, and sauce bubbles, 35 to 45 more minutes.

apple-crumble-recipe-teleculinaria.name: Apple Crumble Recipe
apple-crumble-recipe-teleculinaria.original_name: Receita fácil de crumble de maçã
instructions: In a bowl, pour the flour, the oatmeal and the sugar and then mix their apples, washed and cut into cubes.
Add the cold butter and stir the fingertips until you get a sand texture.

Have the previous mixture in a tray and put it in the oven, preheated at 180°C, for about 25 minutes or until the surface is golden. Remove from the oven, let it cool and crush slightly. Serve with Greek yogurt.

apple-crumble-with-port-wine-teleculinar.name: Apple Crumble With Port Wine
apple-crumble-with-port-wine-teleculinar.original_name: Crumble de maçã com vinho do Porto
instructions: Peel the apples and remove their lump. Cut them on blades and put them in a bowl. Water with port wine, add the moreena flour, sugar and cinnamon and wrap.
Transfer the previous mixture to a tray, cover with aluminium foil and take it to the oven, preheated to 180°C, for 30 minutes, or until the apple becomes soft.
Prepare the crumble: in a bowl, wrap the butter with flour and sugar, mixing well with your fingers until you get a splatter.

Remove the tray from the oven, as well as aluminum, and spread the previous preparation over. Sprinkle with granulated almond and light in the oven, in the grill function, until the surface becomes golden. Remove, cool and serve the warm or cold crumble.

asian-noodle-salad-with-shrimp.name: Asian Noodle Salad With Shrimp

ingredients.item: Thinly sliced japanese cucumbers or persian cucumbers

instructions: Cook noodles in large saucepan of boiling salted water until tender, stirring occasionally, 4 to 5 minutes. Drain. Rinse with cold water; drain well. Using scissors, cut noodles into thirds.
Whisk lime juice, fish chili-garlic and sugar in small bowl until dissolves. Place shrimp in medium bowl. Add 2 tablespoons dressing; toss to coat.
Divide noodles among bowls. Top with cucumber slices and all remaining ingredients. Spoon with dressing over, and drizzle with remaining dressing.

asparagus-and-shiitake-saute.name: Asparagus And Shiitake Sauté
instructions: Sauté chopped scallions, garlic, and peeled ginger in vegetable oil.
Add shiitake caps, 1-inch pieces raw asparagus, and sliced chiles and sauté until tender.
Toss with oyster sauce.
Cook about 1 minute more.

asparagus-scramble-pequerecetas.name: Asparagus Scramble

ingredients.item: 1 cucharada de aceite de oliva virgen extra

instructions: We washed the asparagus and cut the toughest part of the stem. The rest we put into about 3 cm.
If we use a beetle, we pat and revot her first in the frying pan with oil, at medium heat, till she's soft.
We add the asparagus and we skip them about 5- 6 minutes, till they are tender but without losing the crisp point.
Batimos los huevos en un bol con una pizca de sal y pimienta.
We put the fire down, we put the scrambling eggs into the frying pan and we constantly remove them so that they get juicy.
When we have the texture we like (more creamy or more curved), we withdraw from the fire and serve at the moment.

athenian-salad-argiro.name: Athenian Salad

ingredients.item: 1 whistle around 1 kg (or sage or code fresh)
1 whistle around 1 kg (or sage or code fresh)

instructions: In a pot, add the onions engraved, celery, parsley, fish and salt and pepper.
Add the potatoes cleaned, Carrots and add water to cover the fish.
Let it boil.
Boil on high heat without lid for about 25 minutes until the back of the fish is out of the Bone.
A fish about a kilo takes about 25 minutes to boat. However, both potatoes and Carrots will be boated.
Carefuly brings the fish to a platter to cool. Remove the cars and potatoes.
We keep the saddle aside and after it cools down, we drop it on the Athenian.
Fine chop the cars and potatoes into very small frames.
Strain the broth and keep it for another preparation (soup, sauce).
After the fish cools well, clean it very carefully and keep the whole search in a bass.
Add the capers, calculated pickles, peas, celery, mayonnaise, dill, parsley, potatoes and carrots.
With a spoon, mix all the ingredients like potato salad.
Typically we give fish shape to clean fish and garnish with peas carrots etc.
It is much more impressionable to put mesklan leads on a platter and with a 10 cm pickle to give the salad shape. Disform careful and garnish with sprouts and chopped carrot.
Pour some olive oil on each plate.

authentic-masala-chai.name: Authentic Masala Chai
instructions: Bring water to a boil in a small pot. Add ginger, cloves, cinnamon stick, green cardamom, and black cardamom; simmer until flavors infuse, about 5 minutes. Add tea bags; simmer for 1 to 2 minutes. Add milk and sugar; bring back to a boil. Strain tea into mugs.

avocado-mango-salsa.name: Avocado-mango Salsa
instructions: Toss mango, bell pepper, onion, vinegar, sugar, and olive oil together in a bowl; gently fold in avocado. Season with salt.

avocado-toast-with-tomato-corn-salsa.name: Avocado Toast With Tomato-corn Salsa

ingredients.item: Crusty white bread (such as country bread)

instructions: Combine tomatoes, scallions, jalapeño, corn, and lime juice in a medium bowl. Season with salt. Using a fork, gently smash avocado slices evenly onto each toast. Top each generously with tomato-corn salsa.

avocado-tuna-and-tomato-salad.name: Avocado, Tuna, And Tomato Salad
instructions: Split avocado. Save skins and discard pit. Scoop contents into a bowl; slightly mash.
Mix mashed avocado, tuna, tomato, feta cheese, jalapeno pepper, green onion, feta cheese, garlic, cilantro, lime juice, salt, and pepper together in a bowl.
Scoop mixture back into reserved avocado skins and serve immediately or chill until serving.
